category_sources: Official GitHub README documents ios-sim commands for install, launch, showdevicetypes, showsdks, and start.
source_facts.description says it is a command-line application launcher for the iOS Simulator.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses ios-sim.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains usage and command reference sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ios-control/ios-sim, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists simulator install, launch, and start commands.
source_facts.description identifies iOS Simulator command-line launcher role.
